summary: William Meury: Thank you, Alexis, and good morning, everyone. headline: Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Biopharmaceutical company Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 20.9% year on year to $1.27 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $4.86 billion at the midpoint came in 12.9% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.81 per share was 35.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
